analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard 5e spell conventions. Level 5, Druid list, Transmutation school.
analysis.quality: High quality. Detailed description including components, casting time, and a specific mechanical table for race randomization upon effect. The component cost (1,000 gp consumed) is noted, which is crucial.

mechanics.components: V, S, M (rare oils and unguents worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes)
mechanics.effect_summary: Restores a dead humanoid (max 10 days dead) by creating a new adult body and recalling the soul. Race is randomly determined (or chosen by GM) from a d100 table, replacing original racial traits but retaining memories and previous class capabilities.

race_table_mechanics.notes: The table includes several specific subraces (e.g., Dwarf, hill vs. mountain; Elf, dark vs. high vs. wood) and consolidates common races (Human: 20% chance). Note that '00' usually corresponds to the last entry in percentile tables, here leading to Tiefling (97-00, 4% chance).

analysis.data_completeness: Complete. All standard D&D 5e spell fields are present.
